description: DEPRECATED — use config/skills-catalog.json (plx-skills-catalog/v3). This file remains as a legacy pointer for older tooling; skill ids are authoritative in plx-cursor-skills manifest.json (packages[].skillIds), not skills[].

excludedRationale.note: Operator/trading/VMC-internal skills stay in agentic-swarm only until promoted via plx-cursor-skills PR + review.
